common.tagline: Agentic RAG with clickable citations and synced document viewer.

signup.title: Create your Cite account
signup.subtitle: Set up your workspace and start chatting with your documents.

createOrg.title: Create your organization
createOrg.subtitle: Workspaces in Cite are organized by org. Pick a name your team will recognize.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyBody: Upload a document to get started.

onboarding.title: Your workspace is ready
onboarding.body: Cite turns your documents into answers you can defend. Add sources, then ask questions and get responses grounded in exact, verifiable passages.
onboarding.step1Body: Group related documents — one matter, product, or policy set.
onboarding.step2Body: PDF, DOCX, HTML or Markdown — up to 100 MB each.
onboarding.step3Body: Every answer arrives with inline, clickable citations.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Manage how your workspace appears across Cite.
organization.adminHint: Admins manage members and view citation accuracy.
organization.readOnlyHint: Only admins can edit workspace details.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Saved to your account and synced across devices.
preferences.languageHint: Affects the UI and messages app-wide.

members.permissionDeniedDescription: Only workspace admins can manage members and invites. Ask an admin if you need access.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.description: Generate a one-time link. Add an email to pin it to that address, or share an open link.
invite.copyFailed: Couldn't copy. Select the link and copy it manually.

removeDialog.title: Remove {name}?
removeDialog.description: They lose access to this workspace immediately. Their comments remain.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke this invite?
revokeDialog.description: The link stops working right away and can't be restored.

lastAdmin.title: You can't remove the last admin
lastAdmin.description: Promote another member to admin before removing or demoting yourself.

noneYet.title: No conversations yet
noneYet.description: Start one to ask grounded questions about a collection — every answer comes back with verifiable citations.

noResults.title: No conversations match
noResults.description: Nothing for "{query}". Try a different search or clear the filter.
noResults.descriptionFiltered: No conversations in this collection yet. Try a different filter.

noCollections.title: Create a collection first
noCollections.description: You need at least one collection with indexed documents before you can start a conversation.

dialog.title: New conversation
dialog.description: Choose a collection to ground your answers in.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this page.

audit.title: Citation accuracy
audit.subtitle: LLM-judge verdicts on every citation across recent assistant messages.

empty.title: No audited messages yet
empty.description: Every citation is scored automatically after an answer is generated. Once your team starts chatting with sources, accuracy results appear here.

filteredEmpty.title: No matching citations
filteredEmpty.description: No audited citations match the current filters. Try clearing the search or verdict filter.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred and our team has been notified. Try reloading — your work is saved.

forbidden.title: You don't have access
forbidden.description: This page is restricted to workspace admins. Ask an admin if you think you should have access.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.description: Check your connection. Cite will reconnect automatically and pick up where you left off.

removed.title: You've been removed from this workspace
removed.description: An admin removed your access to this workspace. You can still use any other workspaces you belong to.
